post.description: POST /token/refresh: returns new access token if user is active.

Upload assignment answer file and initiate grading.
Args:
    exam_id (int): Exam identifier.
    paper_id (int): Assignment paper identifier.
    file (UploadFile): Uploaded answer file.
    notes (Optional[str], optional): Additional notes. Defaults to None.
    db (Session, optional): DB session. Defaults to Depends(get_db).
    user (User, optional): Current user. Defaults to Depends(get_current_user).
Returns:
    JSONResponse: Details of the created submission and grading status.
